description: Render aims that live in a linked repo: tinted by their source repo's meta color, marked read-only by default, integrated with partial rendering (dotted stub until loaded). Navigating/expanding an external aim loads it (and its relatives as dotted stubs) from the linked repo. Cross-repo edges drawn across the boundary using the same flow-sized arrow visualization.

status.comment: Parked 2026-06-27: repo-level-links-only pivot. Rendering individual external AIMS (dotted stubs, expand-to-load) is dropped; a linked repo is now ONE opaque black-box node. Superseded by the new 'render linked repos as black-box nodes' aim under e81b11c3.
